title: Restful Hellscape
description: Letting you sleep in the dimensions you're not supposed to.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/weTotAPorpY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Well, now it is possible!
This mod lets you sleep in dimensions in which beds would normally explode, though without any of the associated benefits like setting your spawn point.

</br>

Made ~~with insomnia~~ in about 4 hours *very* early in the morning.

Created for ModFest: Singularity!

</br>

<Technical Details></br>
Instead of doing `player.trySleep` (which contains the checks and benefits of sleeping), it instead uses `player.sleep` which just deals with the sleeping animation.
</br></Technical Details>
